user_claim: Customer: Morning. I parked near office and later noticed something off in the front. | Agent: Is this about one part or multiple parts? | Customer: Two things, I think. claim_status_justification: The front bumper shows only a light scratch while the left headlight appears intact, so the combined front-bumper-and-headlight damage claim is not fully supported.
